tool.invoked_via: skillsense-audit.mjs run directly (the slash command is not loaded this session — see caveat)

target: skill/SKILL.md (deep-init entry; references/*.md are progressive-disclosure stage specs, not standalone skills)

triage.contains_always_invoke / always_invoke_i: NOT APPLICABLE — deep-init sets disable-model-invocation:true (deliberately slash-only, user types /deep-init). 'ALWAYS invoke' auto-activation phrasing targets auto-triggered skills; irrelevant here.
triage.contains_do_not: OPTIONAL — a 'do not use for X' scope line is an auto-activation aid; low value for a slash-only command.
triage.tool_names_recognized: FALSE POSITIVE — the audit parsed the rendered '- Read - Glob ...' list and treated '-' as a tool token. SKILL.md's frontmatter allowed-tools is a clean YAML list (Read/Glob/Grep/LS/Bash/Task/Write/Edit). No fix needed.
triage.under_350_chars: BENIGN — description is 511 chars (over_1024:false). The rich trigger phrase list aids discovery; trimming risks losing trigger coverage. Left as-is.

action_taken: NONE — no skill edit warranted; editing for the non-applicable advisories would be cargo-culting and risks the harness (§1 lint + the mutation harness gate SKILL.md). The skill is healthy.
standing_monitor_caveat: The SkillSense plugin is installed + enabled (v0.14.0) but its /skillsense-* slash commands are NOT loaded in this session — the documented activation gotcha (registered != loaded; a FULL editor restart is required, NOT a window reload). To use /skillsense-check / the SLO dashboard interactively, the operator must fully quit + reopen the editor. The underlying audit was run directly here for the  signal. For the expensive trigger-precision measurement, recommend (do not auto-run) /skillsense-eval.
recommendations_for_operator: Restart the editor to activate /skillsense-* for interactive monitoring over the dogfooding period.
Re-run this check (skill_hash gate) after any SKILL.md edit to catch a regression.
